title: CFTRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate I Posts
description: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CFTRI) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Project Associate I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, M.sc can grab this chance and apply for these posts. Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for the CFTRI Recruitment 2026 ....
